name: desktop
description: Ad Free Podcast Player desktop shell
author: Ad Free Podcast Player

scripts.package:win: node scripts/sync-web-ui.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.\Ad Free Podcast Player-win32-x64' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.\dist' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npx @electron/packager . 'Ad Free Podcast Player' --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out .\dist --overwrite --asar --ignore=renderer --ignore=dist --ignore='Ad Free Podcast Player-win32-x64'; Move-Item '.\dist\Ad Free Podcast Player-win32-x64' '.\Ad Free Podcast Player-win32-x64'; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.\dist' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
